tables.name: derived_corporate_action

fields.name: corp_action_available_flag
fields.description: 公司行为数据可用标记 = 任一核心事件asof字段非空

fields.name: latest_corp_action_date
fields.description: 最近公司行为事件日期 = max(event_date <= trade_date)

fields.name: days_since_latest_corp_action
fields.description: 距最近公司行为事件天数 = trade_date - latest_corp_action_date

fields.name: corp_action_event_count_365d
fields.description: 近一年公司行为事件数 = count(event_date in [trade_date-365,trade_date])

fields.name: latest_dividend_ann_date
fields.description: 最近分红公告日 = asof(max(financial_dividend.ann_date <= trade_date))

fields.name: latest_dividend_end_date
fields.description: 最近分红所属报告期 = latest financial_dividend.end_date

fields.name: latest_dividend_ex_date
fields.description: 最近除权除息日 = latest financial_dividend.ex_date

fields.name: latest_dividend_record_date
fields.description: 最近股权登记日 = latest financial_dividend.record_date

fields.name: latest_dividend_proc
fields.description: 最近分红实施进度 = financial_dividend.div_proc

fields.name: cash_dividend_per_share_latest
fields.description: 最近每股现金分红 = financial_dividend.cash_div

fields.name: cash_dividend_after_tax_latest
fields.description: 最近税后每股现金分红 = financial_dividend.cash_div_tax

fields.name: cash_dividend_ttm
fields.description: 近一年每股现金分红合计 = sum(cash_div) over event_date 365d

fields.name: cash_dividend_after_tax_ttm
fields.description: 近一年税后每股现金分红合计 = sum(cash_div_tax) over event_date 365d

fields.name: stock_dividend_ratio_ttm
fields.description: 近一年送转比例合计 = sum(stk_bo_rate+stk_co_rate) over event_date 365d

fields.name: dividend_event_count_365d
fields.description: 近一年分红事件数 = count(dividend events in 365d)

fields.name: days_since_dividend_ann
fields.description: 距最近分红公告天数 = trade_date-latest_dividend_ann_date

fields.name: days_since_ex_dividend
fields.description: 距最近除权除息天数 = trade_date-latest_dividend_ex_date

fields.name: has_dividend_announced_not_executed
fields.description: 是否有已公告未除权分红 = exists(ann_date<=trade_date<ex_date)

fields.name: next_announced_ex_date
fields.description: 下一次已公告除权除息日 = min(ex_date where ann_date<=trade_date<ex_date)

fields.name: next_announced_cash_dividend
fields.description: 下一次已公告每股现金分红 = cash_div at next_announced_ex_date

fields.name: has_forecast_asof

fields.name: latest_forecast_ann_date
fields.description: 最近预告公告日 = latest financial_forecast.ann_date

fields.name: latest_forecast_end_date
fields.description: 最近预告报告期 = latest financial_forecast.end_date

fields.name: forecast_type_code_latest

fields.name: forecast_p_change_min_latest

fields.name: forecast_p_change_max_latest
fields.description: 预告净利变动上限 = financial_forecast.p_change_max

fields.name: forecast_range_width_latest
fields.description: 预告净利润区间宽度 = net_profit_max-net_profit_min

fields.name: forecast_change_range_width_latest
fields.description: 预告变动幅度区间宽度 = p_change_max-p_change_min

fields.name: days_since_forecast_ann
fields.description: 距最近预告公告天数 = trade_date-latest_forecast_ann_date

fields.name: has_express_asof
fields.description: 是否已有业绩快报 = exists(financial_express.ann_date <= trade_date)

fields.name: latest_express_ann_date
fields.description: 最近快报公告日 = latest financial_express.ann_date

fields.description: 最近快报营业利润 = financial_express.operating_profit

fields.description: 最近快报利润总额 = financial_express.total_profit

fields.name: express_equity_attr_parent_latest
fields.description: 最近快报归母权益 = financial_express.equity_attr_parent

fields.description: 最近审计报告期 = latest financial_audit_opinion.end_date

fields.description: 距最近审计公告天数 = trade_date-latest_audit_ann_date

fields.name: latest_repurchase_low_limit
fields.description: 最近回购价格下限 = financial_repurchase.low_limit

fields.description: 近一年回购金额合计 = sum(amount) over 365d

fields.name: repurchase_volume_365d
fields.description: 近一年回购数量合计 = sum(volume) over 365d

fields.name: repurchase_count_365d
fields.description: 近一年回购事件数 = count(repurchase events) over 365d

fields.name: days_since_repurchase_ann
fields.description: 距最近回购公告天数 = trade_date-latest_repurchase_ann_date

fields.name: next_share_float_ratio_30d

fields.name: next_share_float_share_90d

fields.name: next_share_float_ratio_90d
fields.description: 未来90日已公告解禁比例 = sum(float_ratio) with ann_date<=trade_date<float_date<=trade_date+90

tables.name: derived_capital_flow
tables.description: Phase 3 资金流与交易行为核心物理表

fields.name: small_buy_amount
fields.description: 小单买入额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.buy_sm_amount，单位万元

fields.name: small_sell_amount
fields.description: 小单卖出额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.sell_sm_amount，单位万元

fields.name: small_net_amount
fields.description: 小单净流入额 = buy_sm_amount - sell_sm_amount，单位万元

fields.name: medium_buy_amount
fields.description: 中单买入额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.buy_md_amount，单位万元

fields.name: medium_sell_amount
fields.description: 中单卖出额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.sell_md_amount，单位万元

fields.name: medium_net_amount
fields.description: 中单净流入额 = buy_md_amount - sell_md_amount，单位万元

fields.name: large_buy_amount
fields.description: 大单买入额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.buy_lg_amount，单位万元

fields.name: large_sell_amount
fields.description: 大单卖出额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.sell_lg_amount，单位万元

fields.name: large_net_amount
fields.description: 大单净流入额 = buy_lg_amount - sell_lg_amount，单位万元

fields.name: extra_large_buy_amount
fields.description: 超大单买入额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.buy_elg_amount，单位万元

fields.name: extra_large_sell_amount
fields.description: 超大单卖出额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.sell_elg_amount，单位万元

fields.name: extra_large_net_amount
fields.description: 超大单净流入额 = buy_elg_amount - sell_elg_amount，单位万元

fields.name: main_net_amount
fields.description: 主力净流入额 = large_net_amount + extra_large_net_amount，单位万元

fields.name: main_buy_amount
fields.description: 主力买入额 = large_buy_amount + extra_large_buy_amount，单位万元

fields.name: main_sell_amount
fields.description: 主力卖出额 = large_sell_amount + extra_large_sell_amount，单位万元

fields.name: retail_net_amount
fields.description: 散户净流入额 = small_net_amount，单位万元

fields.name: net_mf_amount
fields.description: 总净流入额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.net_mf_amount，单位万元

fields.name: main_net_amount_rate
fields.description: 主力净流入占成交额 = main_net_amount * 10 / derived_daily_spine.amount

fields.name: large_net_amount_rate
fields.description: 大单净流入占成交额 = large_net_amount * 10 / derived_daily_spine.amount

fields.name: extra_large_net_amount_rate
fields.description: 超大单净流入占成交额 = extra_large_net_amount * 10 / derived_daily_spine.amount

fields.name: small_net_amount_rate
fields.description: 小单净流入占成交额 = small_net_amount * 10 / derived_daily_spine.amount

fields.name: main_flow_ma_5
fields.description: 5日主力净流入均值 = avg(main_net_amount,5)，单位万元

fields.name: main_flow_ma_20
fields.description: 20日主力净流入均值 = avg(main_net_amount,20)，单位万元

fields.name: main_flow_ma_60
fields.description: 60日主力净流入均值 = avg(main_net_amount,60)，单位万元

fields.name: main_flow_ma_120
fields.description: 120日主力净流入均值 = avg(main_net_amount,120)，单位万元

fields.name: main_flow_sum_5
fields.description: 5日主力净流入累计 = sum(main_net_amount,5)，单位万元

fields.name: main_flow_sum_20
fields.description: 20日主力净流入累计 = sum(main_net_amount,20)，单位万元

fields.name: main_flow_sum_60
fields.description: 60日主力净流入累计 = sum(main_net_amount,60)，单位万元

fields.name: main_flow_sum_120
fields.description: 120日主力净流入累计 = sum(main_net_amount,120)，单位万元

fields.name: main_flow_positive_days_20
fields.description: 20日主力净流入为正天数 = sum(main_net_amount > 0,20)

fields.name: main_flow_persist_ratio_20
fields.description: 20日主力净流入持续比例 = main_flow_positive_days_20 / 20

fields.name: main_flow_to_total_mv_20
fields.description: 20日主力净流入占总市值 = main_flow_sum_20 / derived_valuation_size.total_mv

fields.name: main_flow_to_circ_mv_20
fields.description: 20日主力净流入占流通市值 = main_flow_sum_20 / derived_valuation_size.circ_mv

fields.name: margin_buy
fields.description: 融资买入额 = margin_detail.margin_buy，单位元

fields.name: margin_repay
fields.description: 融资偿还额 = margin_detail.margin_repay，单位元

fields.name: total_margin_short_balance
fields.description: 两融总余额 = margin_detail.total_balance，单位元

fields.name: margin_balance_chg_5
fields.description: 5日融资余额变化率 = margin_balance / lag(margin_balance,5) - 1

fields.name: margin_balance_chg_20
fields.description: 20日融资余额变化率 = margin_balance / lag(margin_balance,20) - 1

fields.name: margin_balance_chg_60
fields.description: 60日融资余额变化率 = margin_balance / lag(margin_balance,60) - 1

fields.name: margin_balance_chg_120
fields.description: 120日融资余额变化率 = margin_balance / lag(margin_balance,120) - 1

fields.name: margin_buy_to_amount
fields.description: 融资买入占成交额 = margin_buy / (derived_daily_spine.amount * 1000)

fields.name: margin_short_ratio
fields.description: 融券余额/融资余额 = short_balance / margin_balance

fields.name: north_hold_shares_chg_5
fields.description: 5日北向持股数量变化率 = north_hold_shares / lag(north_hold_shares,5) - 1

fields.name: north_hold_shares_chg_20
fields.description: 20日北向持股数量变化率 = north_hold_shares / lag(north_hold_shares,20) - 1

fields.name: north_hold_shares_chg_60
fields.description: 60日北向持股数量变化率 = north_hold_shares / lag(north_hold_shares,60) - 1

fields.name: north_hold_shares_chg_120
fields.description: 120日北向持股数量变化率 = north_hold_shares / lag(north_hold_shares,120) - 1

fields.name: north_hold_ratio_chg_5
fields.description: 5日北向持股比例变化 = north_hold_ratio - lag(north_hold_ratio,5)

fields.name: north_hold_ratio_chg_20
fields.description: 20日北向持股比例变化 = north_hold_ratio - lag(north_hold_ratio,20)

fields.name: north_hold_ratio_chg_60
fields.description: 60日北向持股比例变化 = north_hold_ratio - lag(north_hold_ratio,60)

fields.name: north_hold_ratio_chg_120
fields.description: 120日北向持股比例变化 = north_hold_ratio - lag(north_hold_ratio,120)

fields.name: ret_20_hfq_resid_size_sw_l2_z
fields.description: 20日收益规模行业中性残差z值 = z(resid(ret_20_hfq_z_all ~ log_free_float_mv_z_all + sw_l2_dummy))

fields.name: ret_60_hfq_resid_size_sw_l2_z
fields.description: 60日收益规模行业中性残差z值 = z(resid(ret_60_hfq_z_all ~ log_free_float_mv_z_all + sw_l2_dummy))

fields.name: momentum_60_20_hfq_resid_size_sw_l2_z
fields.description: 60-20日动量规模行业中性残差z值 = z(resid(momentum_60_20_hfq_z_all ~ log_free_float_mv_z_all + sw_l2_dummy))

fields.name: hv_60_resid_size_sw_l2_z
fields.description: 60日历史波动率规模行业中性残差z值 = z(resid(hv_60_z_all ~ log_free_float_mv_z_all + sw_l2_dummy))

fields.name: amihud_20_resid_size_sw_l2_z
fields.description: 20日Amihud流动性冲击规模行业中性残差z值 = z(resid(amihud_20_z_all ~ log_free_float_mv_z_all + sw_l2_dummy))

fields.name: earnings_yield_ttm_resid_size_sw_l2_z
fields.description: 盈利收益率TTM规模行业中性残差z值 = z(resid(earnings_yield_ttm_z_all ~ log_free_float_mv_z_all + sw_l2_dummy))

fields.name: book_to_price_resid_size_sw_l2_z
fields.description: 账面市值比规模行业中性残差z值 = z(resid(book_to_price_z_all ~ log_free_float_mv_z_all + sw_l2_dummy))

fields.name: roe_asof_resid_size_sw_l2_z
fields.description: ROE规模行业中性残差z值 = z(resid(roe_asof_z_all ~ log_free_float_mv_z_all + sw_l2_dummy))

fields.name: revenue_yoy_asof_resid_size_sw_l2_z
fields.description: 营业收入同比规模行业中性残差z值 = z(resid(revenue_yoy_asof_z_all ~ log_free_float_mv_z_all + sw_l2_dummy))

fields.name: value_exposure_z
fields.description: 价值暴露z值 = avg_z(earnings_yield_ttm_z_all, book_to_price_z_all, dividend_yield_ttm_z_all)

fields.name: momentum_exposure_z
fields.description: 动量暴露z值 = avg_z(ret_20_hfq_z_all, ret_60_hfq_z_all, momentum_60_20_hfq_z_all)

fields.name: volatility_exposure_z
fields.description: 波动暴露z值 = avg_z(hv_20_z_all, hv_60_z_all, atr_14_pct_hfq_z_all)

fields.name: liquidity_exposure_z
fields.description: 流动性活跃暴露z值 = avg_z(amount_ma_20_z_all, turnover_rate_ma_20_z_all, -amihud_20_z_all)

fields.name: quality_exposure_z
fields.description: 财务质量暴露z值 = avg_z(roe_asof_z_all, roa_asof_z_all, roic_asof_z_all, ocf_to_profit_asof_z_all, -accrual_ratio_asof_z_all)

fields.name: growth_exposure_z
fields.description: 财务成长暴露z值 = avg_z(revenue_yoy_asof_z_all, netprofit_yoy_asof_z_all, revenue_cagr_3y_asof_z_all, net_profit_cagr_3y_asof_z_all)

fields.name: flow_exposure_z
fields.description: 资金流暴露z值 = avg_z(main_flow_to_total_mv_20_z_all, main_flow_persist_ratio_20_z_all, north_hold_ratio_chg_20_z_all)

tables.name: derived_composite_state
tables.description: Phase 3 composite factual state core physical table; no score fields

fields.name: composite_available_flag
fields.description: 综合状态可用标记 = 任一核心上游模块可用

fields.name: module_available_count
fields.description: 上游模块可用数量 = core module available flags true count

fields.name: module_available_ratio
fields.description: 上游模块可用率 = module_available_count / module_count

fields.name: missing_module_names

tables.name: derived_cross_sectional_full_v
tables.description: Phase 3 截面变换完整视图

fields.name: xs_universe_flag
fields.description: 是否进入截面样本 = is_listed_asof AND has_price AND price_valid_flag

fields.name: xs_sw_l1_code
fields.description: 截面申万一级行业 = derived_sector_concept_context.sw_l1_code

fields.name: xs_sw_l2_code
fields.description: 截面申万二级行业 = derived_sector_concept_context.sw_l2_code

fields.name: xs_sample_all_count
fields.description: 全市场截面样本数 = count(valid universe) over trade_date

fields.name: xs_sample_market_count
fields.description: 市场分组样本数 = count(valid universe) over trade_date, market

fields.name: xs_sample_sw_l1_count
fields.description: 申万一级样本数 = count(valid universe) over trade_date, sw_l1_code

fields.name: xs_sample_sw_l2_count
fields.description: 申万二级样本数 = count(valid universe) over trade_date, sw_l2_code

fields.name: xs_core_available_count
fields.description: 核心截面变量可用数 = count(non_null_core_values)

fields.name: xs_core_available_ratio
fields.description: 核心截面变量可用率 = xs_core_available_count / 45

fields.name: xs_missing_fields
fields.description: 缺失核心字段列表 = string_join(missing field names,';')

fields.name: momentum_exposure_z
fields.description: 动量暴露z值 = avg_z(ret_20_hfq_z_all, ret_60_hfq_z_all, momentum_60_20_hfq_z_all)

fields.name: quality_exposure_z

tables.name: derived_corporate_action_full_v
tables.description: Phase 3 corporate action full view

fields.name: corp_action_available_flag
fields.description: 公司行为数据可用标记 = 任一核心事件asof字段非空

fields.name: latest_corp_action_date
fields.description: 最近公司行为事件日期 = max(event_date <= trade_date)

fields.name: days_since_latest_corp_action
fields.description: 距最近公司行为事件天数 = trade_date - latest_corp_action_date

fields.name: corp_action_event_count_365d
fields.description: 近一年公司行为事件数 = count(event_date in [trade_date-365,trade_date])

fields.name: latest_dividend_ann_date
fields.description: 最近分红公告日 = asof(max(financial_dividend.ann_date <= trade_date))

fields.name: latest_dividend_end_date
fields.description: 最近分红所属报告期 = latest financial_dividend.end_date

fields.name: latest_dividend_ex_date
fields.description: 最近除权除息日 = latest financial_dividend.ex_date

fields.name: latest_dividend_record_date
fields.description: 最近股权登记日 = latest financial_dividend.record_date

fields.name: latest_dividend_proc
fields.description: 最近分红实施进度 = financial_dividend.div_proc

fields.name: cash_dividend_per_share_latest
fields.description: 最近每股现金分红 = financial_dividend.cash_div

fields.name: cash_dividend_after_tax_latest
fields.description: 最近税后每股现金分红 = financial_dividend.cash_div_tax

fields.name: cash_dividend_ttm
fields.description: 近一年每股现金分红合计 = sum(cash_div) over event_date 365d

fields.name: cash_dividend_after_tax_ttm
